lining.en: The jacket has a warm wool lining.
lining.zh: 這件外套有溫暖的羊毛內裡。

liter.en: She bought a liter of milk.

literacy.zh: 學校致力於提升識字能力。

literal.en: The literal meaning of the word is different.
literal.zh: 這個字的字面意思不一樣。

literate.en: Most adults in the country are literate.
literate.zh: 這個國家大多數的成人都識字。

livestock.en: The farmer raises cattle and other livestock.

lizard.en: A small lizard sat on the warm rock.
lizard.zh: 一隻小蜥蜴趴在溫暖的岩石上。

locker.en: She keeps her books in a locker.

lodge.en: We stayed in a ski lodge in the mountains.
lodge.zh: 我們住在山上的一間滑雪小屋。

lofty.en: She has lofty goals for her future.
lofty.zh: 她對未來有崇高的目標。

logo.en: The company's logo is a red star.
logo.zh: 這家公司的標誌是一顆紅星。

lonesome.en: He felt lonesome far from home.

longevity.zh: 健康的飲食有助於長壽。

longitude.en: Lines of longitude run from pole to pole.
longitude.zh: 經線從一極延伸到另一極。

lotion.en: She put lotion on her dry hands.
lotion.zh: 她在乾燥的手上塗乳液。

lottery.en: He dreams of winning the lottery.

lotus.en: Pink lotus flowers floated on the pond.
lotus.zh: 粉紅色的蓮花漂浮在池塘上。

loudspeaker.en: An announcement came over the loudspeaker.

lucrative.en: He found a lucrative new job.
lucrative.zh: 他找到了一份高薪的新工作。

lullaby.en: She sang a soft lullaby to the baby.
lullaby.zh: 她對寶寶唱了一首輕柔的搖籃曲。

lunar.en: We celebrate the Lunar New Year.

lure.en: The bright sign lured customers inside.
lure.zh: 明亮的招牌吸引顧客進去。

lush.en: The valley was green and lush.

magnify.en: The lens can magnify tiny objects.
magnify.zh: 這個鏡頭能放大微小的物體。

maiden.en: The ship made its maiden voyage.
maiden.zh: 這艘船進行了它的處女航。

mainland.en: A ferry connects the island to the mainland.
mainland.zh: 一艘渡輪連接這座島和本島。

majestic.en: The majestic mountains rose above the clouds.
majestic.zh: 雄偉的群山高聳於雲層之上。

majesty.en: We admired the majesty of the waterfall.

manuscript.en: The writer sent her manuscript to a publisher.
manuscript.zh: 這位作家把她的手稿寄給出版社。

maple.en: The maple leaves turn red in autumn.

mar.en: A loud argument marred the happy day.
mar.zh: 一場大吵破壞了這快樂的一天。

marginal.en: The change made only a marginal difference.
marginal.zh: 這個改變只造成了些微的差別。

martial.en: He practices a martial art called judo.
martial.zh: 他練習一種叫柔道的武術。

marvel.en: We marveled at the beautiful sunset.
marvel.zh: 我們驚嘆於美麗的日落。

mastery.en: Mastery of English takes years of practice.
mastery.zh: 精通英文需要多年的練習。

mediate.en: A teacher mediated between the two students.
mediate.zh: 一位老師在兩名學生之間調解。

medieval.zh: 我們參觀了一座中世紀的城堡。

meditate.en: She meditates for ten minutes each morning.
meditate.zh: 她每天早上冥想十分鐘。

melancholy.en: A melancholy mood filled the rainy evening.
melancholy.zh: 一股憂鬱的氣氛瀰漫在這個雨夜。

merchandise.en: The store displays its merchandise neatly.
merchandise.zh: 這家店把商品擺放得很整齊。

mermaid.en: The story is about a kind mermaid.
mermaid.zh: 這個故事是關於一隻善良的美人魚。

migrant.en: Migrant workers came to help with the harvest.
migrant.zh: 外來的工人前來幫忙收成。

mimic.en: The bird can mimic many sounds.
mimic.zh: 這種鳥能模仿許多聲音。

mingle.en: Guests mingled freely at the party.
mingle.zh: 賓客們在派對上自在地交流。

miraculous.zh: 他的康復幾乎是個奇蹟。

miscellaneous.en: The drawer is full of miscellaneous items.
miscellaneous.zh: 這個抽屜裝滿了雜七雜八的東西。

mischievous.en: The mischievous puppy chewed my shoe.
mischievous.zh: 那隻調皮的小狗咬了我的鞋。

mistress.en: The mistress of the house greeted us warmly.
mistress.zh: 這棟房子的女主人熱情地迎接我們。

mobilize.en: They mobilized volunteers to clean the park.
mobilize.zh: 他們動員志工來打掃公園。

modernization.en: The city went through rapid modernization.
modernization.zh: 這座城市經歷了快速的現代化。

modernize.en: They plan to modernize the old factory.
modernize.zh: 他們打算讓這座舊工廠現代化。

momentum.en: The team gained momentum after the goal.

monarch.en: The monarch ruled the kingdom wisely.
monarch.zh: 這位君主明智地治理王國。

monetary.zh: 他們得到了金錢上的獎賞。

monotony.en: She broke the monotony with a short trip.
monotony.zh: 她用一趟短途旅行打破單調。

moody.en: He has been moody all week.
moody.zh: 他整個禮拜都喜怒無常。

morale.zh: 獲勝提振了團隊的士氣。

motherhood.zh: 為人母改變了她的人生。

motto.zh: 她的座右銘是「永不放棄」。

mound.en: The dog dug up a mound of earth.

mourn.en: The whole town mourned the loss.
mourn.zh: 全鎮的人都為這個損失哀悼。

mow.en: He mows the lawn every Sunday.

muse.en: She sat by the window to muse.

mustache.en: He grew a thick black mustache.
mustache.zh: 他留了一撮濃密的黑鬍子。

mute.en: She pressed mute to silence the phone.
mute.zh: 她按下靜音把手機調成無聲。

nag.en: Stop nagging me about my homework.

narrate.en: He narrated the story in a calm voice.
narrate.zh: 他用平靜的聲音講述這個故事。

narrator.en: The narrator describes the scene clearly.
narrator.zh: 敘述者把場景描述得很清楚。

nationalism.zh: 歷史課討論了民族主義。

navigation.en: The ship used radar for navigation.

nearsighted.en: She is nearsighted and wears glasses.

nickel.en: A nickel is a small American coin.
nickel.zh: nickel 是一種美國小硬幣。

nostril.en: A strange smell reached his nostrils.
nostril.zh: 一股奇怪的味道飄進他的鼻孔。

notable.en: She made a notable improvement in math.
notable.zh: 她的數學有了顯著的進步。

notorious.en: The road is notorious for accidents.
notorious.zh: 這條路因常發生意外而惡名昭彰。

novice.en: As a novice, she made a few mistakes.
novice.zh: 身為新手，她犯了幾個錯。

nucleus.en: The nucleus is the center of a cell.

nude.en: The art class drew a nude statue.
nude.zh: 美術課畫了一尊裸體雕像。

nurture.zh: 好老師培育年輕的人才。

oasis.en: The travelers found water at an oasis.

oath.en: The soldier took an oath of loyalty.

oblige.en: I feel obliged to help my neighbor.
oblige.zh: 我覺得有義務幫助我的鄰居。

obstinate.en: The obstinate child refused to move.
obstinate.zh: 那個固執的孩子不肯動。

occurrence.en: Snow is a rare occurrence here.

octopus.en: An octopus has eight long arms.

odor.en: A strong odor came from the kitchen.
odor.zh: 廚房傳來一股濃烈的氣味。

offshore.zh: 他們建造了離岸風力發電機。

operative.en: The new rule is now operative.
operative.zh: 這項新規定現在生效了。

oppress.en: The cruel ruler oppressed the people.
oppress.zh: 殘暴的統治者壓迫人民。

oppression.en: They fought against years of oppression.

ordeal.en: The long illness was a real ordeal.
ordeal.zh: 這場久病是個真正的折磨。

orderly.en: The students left the room in an orderly way.
orderly.zh: 學生們有秩序地離開了房間。

organizer.zh: 活動的主辦人規劃了一切。

orient.en: She used a map to orient herself.

oriental.en: The room was decorated in an oriental style.
oriental.zh: 這個房間以東方風格裝飾。

originate.en: Tea is said to originate in China.

ornament.en: She hung an ornament on the tree.
ornament.zh: 她在樹上掛了一個飾品。

orphanage.en: They donated toys to the orphanage.

orthodox.zh: 他採用正統的教學方法。

ounce.en: Add an ounce of sugar to the mix.
ounce.zh: 在混合物裡加一盎司的糖。

outbreak.en: There was an outbreak of flu at school.

outing.en: We went on a family outing to the zoo.
outing.zh: 我們全家去動物園郊遊。

outlaw.en: The new law will outlaw smoking indoors.
outlaw.zh: 新法律將禁止室內吸菸。

outlook.en: She has a positive outlook on life.
outlook.zh: 她對人生抱持正面的看法。

outnumber.en: The girls outnumber the boys in this class.
outnumber.zh: 這個班女生的人數多於男生。

outrage.en: The unfair decision caused public outrage.
outrage.zh: 這個不公平的決定引起了公憤。

outrageous.en: The price of the ticket was outrageous.
outrageous.zh: 這張票的價格貴得離譜。

outset.en: She knew the risks from the outset.
outset.zh: 她從一開始就知道有風險。

outskirts.en: They live on the outskirts of the city.

outward.en: Her outward calm hid her worry.
outward.zh: 她表面的平靜掩飾了她的擔憂。

overdo.en: Don't overdo the exercise on your first day.

overflow.en: The river began to overflow its banks.

overhear.en: I happened to overhear their plan.
overhear.zh: 我碰巧聽到了他們的計畫。

overlap.en: The two meetings overlap in time.
overlap.zh: 這兩場會議的時間重疊了。

oyster.en: She found a pearl inside the oyster.
oyster.zh: 她在牡蠣裡找到了一顆珍珠。

ozone.en: The ozone layer protects us from the sun.
ozone.zh: 臭氧層保護我們不受太陽傷害。

packet.en: She opened a packet of crackers.

paddle.en: He used a paddle to move the canoe.

paperback.en: I bought a cheap paperback at the station.
paperback.zh: 我在車站買了一本便宜的平裝書。

paradox.en: It is a paradox that less can be more.
paradox.zh: 少即是多是個矛盾的道理。

paralyze.zh: 那場意外使他的雙腿癱瘓。

pastime.zh: 釣魚是他最喜歡的消遣。

patriot.en: The patriot served his country proudly.
patriot.zh: 這位愛國者自豪地為國效力。

patriotic.zh: 他們唱了一首愛國歌曲。

peacock.en: The peacock spread its colorful tail.
peacock.zh: 孔雀展開了牠色彩繽紛的尾羽。

pebble.en: He skipped a pebble across the pond.
pebble.zh: 他讓一顆小石子在池塘上打水漂。

peek.en: She took a peek inside the box.
peek.zh: 她偷瞄了一眼盒子裡面。

peninsula.en: The town sits on a narrow peninsula.
peninsula.zh: 這個小鎮位於一個狹長的半島上。

perch.en: A bird perched on the wire.

peril.en: The sailors were in great peril during the storm.
peril.zh: 暴風雨中水手們身陷險境。

perish.en: Many plants perished in the cold.
perish.zh: 許多植物在寒冷中枯死。

permissible.en: It is not permissible to park here.

persevere.zh: 儘管多次失敗，她仍堅持不懈。

persistence.zh: 他的堅持終於有了回報。

pharmacist.en: The pharmacist gave me the right medicine.

pharmacy.en: I picked up my prescription at the pharmacy.
pharmacy.zh: 我在藥局領了我的處方藥。

pianist.en: The pianist played a lovely tune.
pianist.zh: 鋼琴家彈了一首動聽的曲子。

pickpocket.en: Watch out for pickpockets in the crowd.

pilgrim.en: The pilgrim traveled far to the holy site.
pilgrim.zh: 朝聖者長途跋涉前往聖地。

pimple.en: She had a small pimple on her chin.
pimple.zh: 她下巴上長了一顆小痘痘。

pinch.en: Add a pinch of salt to the soup.

plague.en: A plague spread across the ancient city.
plague.zh: 一場瘟疫蔓延過這座古城。

plantation.en: They grow tea on a large plantation.
plantation.zh: 他們在一座大農園種茶。

playwright.en: The playwright wrote a famous play.
playwright.zh: 這位劇作家寫了一齣著名的戲劇。

plow.en: The farmer plowed the field before planting.

polar.en: Polar bears live in the cold north.
polar.zh: 北極熊住在寒冷的北方。

pony.en: The child rode a small pony.
pony.zh: 那個孩子騎了一匹小馬。

populate.en: Settlers began to populate the valley.
populate.zh: 移居者開始在山谷裡定居。
